response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned the video to identify content. The video contains crowd footage, stage setup, and introduction screens, followed by a performance. 2. Identified the song title from on-screen text as 'Ridin' on Dreams' by 'hololive IDOL PROJECT'. 3. Mapped the scenes: 00:00-02:40 is the intro/crowd footage (no song), 02:40-05:03 is the performance of 'Ridin' on Dreams'. 4. Executed a search for 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin' on Dreams lyrics'. 5. Retrieved the full Japanese lyrics from the search result and performed an accurate translation into English. 6. Constructed the final JSON response based on the required schema.
response.global_summary: This video features a concert performance of the song "Ridin' on Dreams" by the Hololive IDOL PROJECT. The video begins with crowd footage, light stick displays, and introductory screens for the various performers, followed by the main stage performance of the song.

scenes.description: Crowd shots with glowing light sticks and introductory screens for the performers, preceding the main song.
Main stage performance of 'Ridin' on Dreams' by multiple Hololive members. The song features high-energy group vocals and synchronized choreography.
